prompt:
Create a production-ready icon atlas for a dark Japanese ninja-fantasy RPG.
The canvas is a strict 5 by 5 grid in exact row-major order.
Every cell is an equal square dark obsidian rounded tile separated by thin black gutters.
Each populated tile contains one centered emblem with a strong silhouette, refined cel-painted detail, subtle gold rim, restrained elemental glow, and consistent three-quarter relief.
Keep every emblem fully inside its own cell with generous padding; nothing may cross a cell boundary.
Cell assignments:
row 1 column 1: 火 (fire) — a curling orange-red flame around a coal ember
row 1 column 2: 风 (wind) — a sharp turquoise crescent gust with three streaming arcs
row 1 column 3: 雷 (lightning) — a branching electric bolt around a bright violet core
row 1 column 4: 水 (water) — a blue whirlpool and suspended water droplet
row 1 column 5: 土 (earth) — layered ochre stone plates rising like a barrier
row 2 column 1: 木 (wood) — a living branch and fresh leaves twisting upward
row 2 column 2: 阴 (yin) — a dark crescent moon with a violet illusion ripple
row 2 column 3: 阳 (yang) — a radiant ivory sun spiral with warm gold rays
row 2 column 4: 封印 (seal) — concentric crimson sealing rings and crossed energy chains
row 2 column 5: 医疗 (medical) — a mint-green healing palm over a pulse of light
row 3 column 1: 体术 (taijutsu) — a bandaged fist striking through a circular shockwave
row 3 column 2: 幻术 (genjutsu) — a hypnotic indigo eye surrounded by warped rings
row 3 column 3: 尾兽 (tailed_beast) — a fierce red-orange chakra beast silhouette with nine flowing tails
row 3 column 4: 致命攻击 (fatal) — a crimson meteor impact and fractured warning halo
row 3 column 5: 控制招式 (control) — violet binding cords locking a faceted target crystal
row 4 column 1: 强化/恢复 (support) — a jade shield with an upward golden chakra stream
row 4 column 2: 直接攻击 (attack) — a bright steel slash and forward red impact arrow shape without text
row 4 column 3: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 4 column 4: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 4 column 5: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 5 column 1: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 5 column 2: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 5 column 3: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 5 column 4: an empty dark tile with no symbol
row 5 column 5: an empty dark tile with no symbol
No text, letters, numbers, kanji, labels, logos, UI captions, signatures, or watermarks anywhere.
Do not merge cells. Do not change the order. Keep the visual system consistent across the complete atlas.
Internal production filename reference only: sheet-core.png.
style: cohesive premium 2D anime RPG interface art, crisp iconography
composition: strict equal-cell icon atlas with exact row-major ordering
constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no cross-cell elements

prompt:
Create a production-ready icon atlas for a dark Japanese ninja-fantasy RPG.
The canvas is a strict 5 by 5 grid in exact row-major order.
Every cell is an equal square dark obsidian rounded tile separated by thin black gutters.
Each populated tile contains one centered emblem with a strong silhouette, refined cel-painted detail, subtle gold rim, restrained elemental glow, and consistent three-quarter relief.
Keep every emblem fully inside its own cell with generous padding; nothing may cross a cell boundary.
Cell assignments:
row 1 column 1: 忍术/体术 (attack) — a wrapped fist crossing a bright elemental chakra slash
row 1 column 2: 防御/反击 (guard) — a reinforced forearm guard deflecting a sharp impact spark
row 1 column 3: 使用道具 (item) — a compact ninja supply pouch with one glowing medicine vial
row 1 column 4: 契约支援 (contract) — two luminous life threads joining at a small summoning seal
row 1 column 5: 逃跑/退出 (retreat) — a swift ninja silhouette leaping away through a smoke burst
row 2 column 1: 调整站位 (position) — three tactical ground markers connected by a curved movement arrow
row 2 column 2: 队友指令 (ally_order) — three allied silhouettes arranged around a tactical command marker
row 2 column 3: 队友奥义 (ally_ultimate) — two allied chakra streams converging into one brilliant finishing strike
row 2 column 4: 移动 (travel) — a ninja sandal stepping across a compact map compass
row 2 column 5: 休息 (rest) — a warm camp lantern beside a folded bedroll and calm chakra glow
row 3 column 1: 锻炼 (train) — a battered wooden training post struck by a wrapped fist
row 3 column 2: 深入探索 (explore) — a hooded scout silhouette entering a moonlit forest path
row 3 column 3: 采集素材 (gather) — a medicinal leaf, mineral shard, and small gathering knife
row 3 column 4: 观察四周 (observe) — a focused ninja eye above widening sensory rings
row 3 column 5: 任务 (quests) — a rolled mission scroll pinned by a small blank wooden tag
row 4 column 1: 查看状态 (status) — a human silhouette beside three clean rising status bars without text
row 4 column 2: 战斗配置 (loadout) — a kunai, technique scroll, and armor plate arranged as a tactical kit
row 4 column 3: 阵营声望 (faction) — three distinct village banners surrounding a handshake emblem without symbols
row 4 column 4: 忍具工坊 (workshop) — a blacksmith hammer striking a glowing kunai on a compact anvil
row 4 column 5: 通缉榜 (wanted) — a shadowed rogue portrait on torn parchment with a red threat mark and no writing
row 5 column 1: 收藏馆 (collection) — an open archive book holding several glowing collectible emblems
row 5 column 2: 新周目挑战 (new_cycle) — a golden spiral path looping around a rising sun
row 5 column 3: 保存游戏 (save) — a sealed memory scroll tied with a glowing green cord
row 5 column 4: 读取游戏 (load) — an opening memory scroll releasing a blue scene silhouette
row 5 column 5: an empty dark tile with no symbol
No text, letters, numbers, kanji, labels, logos, UI captions, signatures, or watermarks anywhere.
Do not merge cells. Do not change the order. Keep the visual system consistent across the complete atlas.
Internal production filename reference only: sheet-actions.png.
style: cohesive premium 2D anime RPG interface art, crisp iconography
composition: strict equal-cell icon atlas with exact row-major ordering
constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no cross-cell elements

prompt:
Create a vertical collectible wanted-poster illustration for a dark Japanese ninja-fantasy RPG.
Target concept: 森林狼王 — a gigantic scarred gray forest wolf alpha snarling from tangled cedar roots, feral amber eyes, torn ear, fast predator posture.
Aged parchment mounted on a weathered mission board, hand-painted anime wanted portrait, ink splashes, torn fibers, red threat-stamp shapes with no glyphs, and a blank nameplate area.
Strong centered target silhouette, head and torso or full creature visible, dramatic but readable at thumbnail size.
Muted sepia paper with one target-specific accent color, polished game collectible quality.
No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no signatures, no watermark, no extra characters.
